description: Executable JSON scenarios for TypeScript/JavaScript and Go SDK conformance runners.

coverage_scenarios.title: Retry policy keeps the same idempotency key for retryable gateway failures
SSE helpers preserve per-job event ordering
Client timeout aborts without changing idempotency state
Unicode prompts round-trip through request serialization
Large request bodies surface stable validation errors
Malformed gateway responses surface transport errors with raw body access
Webhook helper signs timestamp.nonce.body and rejects replay
Sidecar discovery prefers loopback and rejects public binding by default
Gateway dispatches accepted work once after payload policy and idempotency checks
File-spool worker consumer leases gateway work and ingests normalized terminal results
NATS worker consumer leases JetStream jobs and ingests normalized terminal results
Webhook outbox persists terminal job callbacks and retries signed delivery attempts
Browser topology reads expose instance/context/tab hierarchy with boolean storage indicator
Adaptive concurrency exposes AIMD ceilings per provider and identity with last-change reason
Manual-action alerts route human-solved CAPTCHA/login challenges with acknowledge/resolve lifecycle
Audit export returns a hash-chained, tamper-evident set with chain_valid verification
SSO-minted sessions are revocable and logout invalidates the session immediately
Cross-engine execution runs portable selectors on Chromium CDP and Firefox/WebKit BiDi and remote grids
Enterprise Postgres persistence stores control-plane state with edge SQLite parity

scenarios.title: Health endpoint returns a healthy gateway state
Readiness endpoint returns ready true
Version endpoint returns supported API versions
Workflow catalog endpoint returns a scoped collection envelope
Template catalog endpoint returns configured template records
Target catalog endpoint returns target descriptors
Adapter catalog endpoint returns adapter manifests
Application catalog endpoint returns scoped app records
Device catalog endpoint returns scoped device records
Audit endpoint returns append-only audit records
Webhook destination endpoint returns a collection envelope
Global event list endpoint returns a collection envelope
Cache status endpoint reports the current edge cache posture
Metrics endpoint returns Prometheus text
Create job sends API version and idempotency key
Create job replay preserves the original job id
Create job forwards model_settings and conversation_id
Out-of-catalog model is rejected before dispatch

error.message: Requested model is not in the target adapter model catalog.

scenarios.title: Get job returns completed output
Job event list uses cursor pagination
SSE event helper reads per-job event stream bytes
Job artifact list returns artifact metadata without bucket internals
Job artifact download returns artifact bytes and checksum headers
Job artifact upload sends bytes with an idempotency key
Job artifact delete is an idempotent mutating request
List jobs supports cursor and status filtering
Cancel job is a state-mutating idempotent request
Retry job is a state-mutating idempotent request
Webhook replay request is idempotent
Missing credential preserves stable auth error envelope
Idempotency conflict preserves validation error envelope

error.message: Same idempotency key was replayed with a different canonical payload

scenarios.title: Rate limit error exposes retry-after metadata
Browser summary returns topology counts without storage-state URIs
Browser instances list exposes engine and a boolean storage indicator
Browser contexts list exposes has_storage_state boolean and never a storage_state_uri
Browser tabs list exposes tab lifecycle state and boolean storage indicator only
Concurrency list returns AIMD caps with bounds and last-change reason
Manual-action alerts list returns open challenges with lifecycle status

data.detail: CAPTCHA wall detected mid-job. A human operator must solve it via noVNC; UBAG never auto-solves.

scenarios.title: Alert config returns SMTP status flag without exposing the password

body.resolution: Human-solved (noVNC takeover) — no automated CAPTCHA bypass

scenarios.title: Acknowledge alert records that a human is handling the challenge
Resolve alert marks the human action complete so the tab may resume
Audit export returns a hash-chained set with chain_valid true
SSO logout revokes the current session immediately
